title: angraecopsis rutila
intro: Angraecopsis rutila is a flowering plant species commonly known as the "red-lipped orchid" due to its distinctive lip color. Medicinally, the plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Angraecopsis rutila include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
